official_functions.function_or_member: ClientboundSoundPacket(Holder<SoundEvent>, SoundSource, double, double, double, float, float, long)
official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound sound fixture
Encode/decode the bounded SoundEvent holder through official network holder policy
Write and dispatch the full Play clientbound framed packet

invariants: The official Play clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the sound body.
The official sound fixture preserves the SoundEvent holder value, source, quantized positions, volume, pitch, seed, and consumes the body.
This contract does not prove arbitrary SoundEvent holders, world sound playback, sound asset readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this packet-support contract to infer general sound registry, world sound, sound asset, or playback behavior.
